rejectModal.description: Tell the buyer why the slip was rejected. They'll be able to re-upload from the checkout page.
rejectModal.placeholder: e.g. Slip image is unclear / amount doesn't match / wrong account

details.title: Withdrawal Details
details.rejectConfirm: Reject this withdrawal? The amount will be refunded to the user balance.
details.failConfirm: Mark this withdrawal as failed? The amount will be refunded to the user balance.
details.useApproveToSave: Use Approve or Reject to save note while withdrawal is pending

methods.title: Payment methods
methods.subtitle: Configure platform-wide payment options
methods.headerDesc: Bank accounts, PromptPay IDs, and wallet QRs that customers see at checkout. Toggle off any account that has issues — it disappears from checkout instantly.

methods.formQrHint: Upload to R2/Cloudinary first, then paste the URL here
methods.promptpayInfo: 💡 PromptPay QR is generated dynamically per order with the exact amount baked in. No image upload needed.
methods.deleteConfirm: Delete this payment method? Existing slips will keep referencing it.
